name: CREATE: GLOBAL DOMINION (content layer demo)
summary: Minimal SelectedModList showing mods[] plus content[]: verified Modrinth resource pack default-dark-mode (kind resourcepack), and JJThunder To The Max as a Modrinth datapack row (project_type mod + datapack-only loaders) resolved via the narrow edge path to manual_world_creation. Fabric baseline mods for fast dry-run resolves.

mods.reason_selected: Fabric API baseline for dry-run resolves.
Renderer baseline (pairs with content-export Sodium+shader warnings when shaders are added).

notes: Verified Modrinth resourcepack; installs under resourcepacks/ in .mrpack and Prism exports; not enabled by default.
JJThunder To The Max is intentionally manual world-creation content.
It is not copied into mods/ and is omitted from .mrpack files[].
It must be added when creating a new world (save's datapacks folder); do not retrofit onto existing worlds without a backup.

JJThunder is listed as a Modrinth content[] datapack row: MythWeaver applies the mod-project + datapack-only file edge (see AGENTS.md Content kinds). It is not bundled into exports; follow report/datapack sections and JJThunder guidance. Datapack rows use placement manual_world_creation unless future starter-world support exists (not implemented).
